S.n: Today's Healthcare System Is Failing Patients — and Providers

B.x: Today's Healthcare System Is Failing Patients — and Providers

I.title: Misdiagnosis Rates
I.x: 1 in 3 adults receives a missed or delayed diagnosis each year, leading to preventable harm

I.title: Crushing Wait Times
I.x: Average ER wait exceeds 4 hours; specialist appointments stretch 3–6 weeks for critical cases

I.title: Fragmented Data Silos
I.x: Patient records scattered across 5+ systems with no unified intelligence layer

B.x: The cost of inaction: $935B lost annually in the US alone due to diagnostic errors and inefficiencies.
B.title: Industry Impact

S.n: Our AI Pipeline Turns Raw Data Into Life-Saving Decisions

B.x: Our AI Pipeline Turns Raw Data Into Life-Saving Decisions
A unified, HIPAA-compliant pipeline that ingests multi-modal patient data, applies clinical-grade ML models, and surfaces actionable recommendations at the point of care — in under 2 seconds.

I: Integrates with EHR, imaging, labs, and wearables
Explainable AI outputs trusted by clinicians
Continuously retrained on de-identified outcomes data
